title: Contact | Alberto Costa
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Alberto Costa, Member of Parliament for South Leicestershire.
text_excerpt: Contact | Alberto Costa Skip to main content Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Main navigation About Alberto News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Apply now: Alberto Costa's Westminster Summer School (16-19 year olds) Surgeries Alberto Costa Conservative MP for South Leicestershire Contact Leave this field blank Office of Alberto Costa Unit 3, 8A Lutterworth Road Blaby LE8 4DN 0116 278 1924 [email protected] Alberto Costa Alberto Costa My office welcomes correspondence expressing your views. We respect those who have passionately held views. However, you will equally understand that we should all have the right to a working environment free from abuse. My office has a zero tolerance approach to abusive, aggressive or offensive correspondence – any such correspondence may be, if necessary, forwarded to the police. You will, I am sure agree, that correspondence of this nature is entirely unnecessary. All of us have the right to be treated with respect so please do keep this in mind before contacting my office. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
